overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin in a bus simulator game, driving through heavy rain on urban streets. The bus executes a left turn at an intersection, stops at a covered bus stop for passengers to board, and continues through the wet city environment with active windshield wipers and realistic rain effects on the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban intersection approach in heavy rain

events.description: bus accelerates from stationary position at traffic light
approaching intersection with traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: operating the bus through heavy rain, windshield wipers active, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: oncoming traffic with headlights on, approaching from opposite direction

entered.detail: driver's control panel with speedometer, GPS screen, and various buttons
active wipers clearing heavy rain from front windshield
rain-slicked multi-lane road with reflections of vehicle lights
multi-story residential buildings with modern facades lining the street
row of trees lining the left side of the avenue
tall pole with traffic signals at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through a heavy downpour on a multi-lane city street, windshield wipers sweeping rhythmically. The dashboard instrumentation is clearly visible, and modern apartment buildings line the right side while trees border the left. Oncoming traffic approaches with headlights cutting through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection during left turn maneuver

events.description: bus initiates wide left turn at intersection
gold sedan passes alongside on the left side of the bus

agents.ego_description: executing a left turn at the intersection while maintaining speed through the wet roads

notable_agents.action: gold sedan driving parallel to the bus during the turn, then moving ahead

entered.detail: metallic gold passenger car visible through the left side window
white painted lines and crosswalk markings on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The bus navigates a left turn at the intersection, revealing a gold sedan passing on the left side. The windshield wipers continue their rapid sweep as the bus completes the turn and straightens out on the new road, with apartment buildings now visible further in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop with passenger boarding area

events.description: bus slows and comes to a complete stop at the bus stop
bus doors open and passengers begin boarding from the shelter

agents.ego_description: pulling up to the bus stop, opening doors, and waiting for passengers to board

notable_agents.action: group of passengers waiting under shelter, then boarding the bus one by one

entered.detail: covered waiting area with glass panels and concrete roof structure
vertical sign indicating bus stop location
interior cabin lights illuminating as the bus stops

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls up to a covered bus stop where several passengers are waiting under the shelter from the rain. The doors open and passengers board while the bus remains stationary. The interior cabin lights become visible as the exterior lighting changes, and the windshield wipers continue moving.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with tram tracks

events.description: bus closes doors and accelerates away from the bus stop
red tram passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the bus stop and continuing down the wet street, passing a tram

notable_agents.action: red tram moving parallel to the bus on adjacent tracks

entered.detail: long red articulated tram visible through the right side windows

segments.scene_description: The bus departs from the stop and accelerates along the wet road, passing by a red tram on the right side. The heavy rain continues with wipers active, and the bus drives past more apartment buildings and trees lining the street, maintaining steady speed through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked urban route from a main thoroughfare to a passenger stop and back into the city flow. It begins with the bus driving through a heavy downpour on a multi-lane street, where rhythmic windshield wipers clear the view of oncoming headlights and lining apartment buildings. As the bus executes a left turn at an intersection, the camera captures a gold sedan passing by before the vehicle straightens out on a new road. The scene then shifts as the bus pulls over to a covered stop, pausing to let waiting passengers board while the interior cabin lights become more prominent against the gray exterior. Finally, the bus accelerates away from the shelter, passing a red tram on the right and continuing past trees and buildings through the persistent rain.
